positive: A retro, synthwave-inspired illustration of a cosmic cityscape viewed from a floating platform. The scene features neon geometric lines, stylized palm trees, and a giant setting sun casting a pink and purple gradient across the sky. The aesthetic should be vaporwave, 80s arcade poster art, isometric view, flat design elements mixed with dramatic glow. Color palette must include neon magenta, electric cyan, and deep indigo. Perfect for t-shirts and posters. Cinematic lighting, vibrant glow, highly detailed vector art, high contrast, 4k, masterpiece.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, realism, organic mess, grayscale, dirty, noise
